# Aztreonam 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Aztreonam 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Aztreonam</strong> 目前有 <strong>22 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Aztreonam 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Emblaveo is indicated for the treatment of the following infections in adult patients (see sections 4.4 and 5.1):• Complicated intra-abdominal infection (cIAI)• Hospital-acquired pneumonia (HAP),...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>polyclonal hyperviscosity syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>hyperamylasemia（99.7%）</li>
<li>urinary tract infection (disease)（99.7%）</li>
<li>congenital analbuminemia（99.7%）</li>
<li>Ureaplasma urethritis（99.6%）</li>
<li>gonococcal urethritis（99.6%）</li>
<li>blood group incompatibility（99.6%）</li>
<li>premalignant hematological system disease（99.5%）</li>
<li>epiglottitis（99.5%）</li>
<li>monoclonal gammopathy（99.5%）</li>
<li>xanthogranulomatous pyelonephritis（99.5%）</li>
<li>uterine inflammatory disease（99.5%）</li>
<li>hematological disease associated with an acquired peripheral neuropathy（99.5%）</li>
<li>septicemic plague（99.4%）</li>
<li>congenital hematological disorder（99.3%）</li>
<li>Peptostreptococcus infectious disease（99.3%）</li>
<li>staphylococcus aureus infection（99.2%）</li>
<li>toxocariasis（99.1%）</li>
<li>streptococcal pneumonia（98.9%）</li>
<li>urogenital tuberculosis（98.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/aztreonam/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
